FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Initial version
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Initial version & tooling. Mod still under development.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Updates
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: General updates to address API and convention changes in the base mod

patchNoteLines.li: General updates to address API and convention changes in the base mod (Empire Refactored)
